created_work_items.title: DockerFiles: update dependencies and pkg's versions
Test Server: improve tools and environment
Logger: add Date of the workout
Logger page: Error and warning messages
Routing from Measurement table to single dates does not work
Recovery model and interface to upload csv
Hierarchical Documentation Index to Reduce Cursor Context Usage
Add more dropdowns management for Exercise's columns
Align workout tables format with routines
Add protocol to routine round/item (including default mapping)
Logging tool or datatabase changes observation solution
Plans -> create a generic model in the backend
# routines -> to add additional measurements like distance, calories, time
# analyze and implement how to allow routine/sets that include more than 1 exercise
# routines -> to add protocols (strength, hypertrophy, dropset, combo, cluster, cardio, hiit)
if user is coach, it should be able to create new custom exercises, and we as devs should be able to make these exercises public for everyone if we want
# calendar_dates -> attribute types to be checked
workout_templates does not need a microcycle, it should go the other way around
consider if remove routine <-> rpe relationship and keep only an integer
# calendar_dates -> analyze if we need all these columns
Exercises load a list of exercises
intensity tables, create data and conversions
Auth -> Install Devise, pundit, oauth Google
Review: Should we keep 1-month limit to edit routines
set simple pages to see raw data
Pundit -> how to integrate Pundit with our role assignments
Admin Panel - Exercise Editing Fix (Priority: High)
Build utility components (Loading, Empty States, Toast, DatePicker)
Create test to check individual functionalities of the tool
Adding a create set button at the end of a group.
Styling of elements are in one place for each element - componetize
Drag and drop works reliably on the level of round/groups, sets, exercises
Enforce frontend patterns for future work
Logger: Performance / high latency modifying values
Logger: Implement 'Column Settings' dialog for Items
08 - Create a page: Logbook's Exercises Mapping
07 - Create a way to map the CSV exercises to the APP's Exercises
05 - Create models to map the data loaded by the page: Loogbook Imports to Routines
04 - Create a page: Loogbook Imports (to Import logbook CSV files)
03 - Interface for importing logbook CSV to database

Removing last exercise in set error - Include in the plan: creating test using my admin user, this user has credentials in .dev.env files, reference it in the file, test should be replicating the user by http responses, debug them, add information to t...
